expectations.text: Explains that chunks are discarded after LOD building (unloadChunk with save=false)
expectations.evidence: Does NOT mention chunk discarding at all. Claims chunks 'are permanently saved to your world's region files just like any chunk a player walks through'

expectations.text: Correctly states that world size should NOT grow from pregen
expectations.evidence: Incorrectly states 'your world will balloon significantly' and 'Each fully generated chunk consumes real disk space'

expectations.text: Explains what generate_new_chunks=false means (only builds LODs from already-explored chunks)
expectations.evidence: Correctly explains false means 'only create LOD data for chunks that have already been generated'

expectations.text: Does NOT incorrectly claim that generate_new_chunks=true permanently saves generated chunks
expectations.evidence: Explicitly claims 'These chunks are permanently saved to your world's region files' — this is wrong
